title: Require Blueprint Packet Topology
forbids: an open blueprint packet, a missing rule or baseline, or a runner source outside the canonical pattern.md and structure.toml names
why: Every generic blueprint rule is one closed policy packet. Stable packet names let Habitat validate topology and let native Grit tests execute the exact registered source without a parallel rule inventory.
remediate: Keep rule.json and baseline.json in every blueprint packet, add only the runner source selected by the rule as pattern.md or structure.toml, and remove unrelated files from the packet.
message: Blueprint packets must retain one closed canonical policy surface.
